name: youtube_v3_live_chat_messages
description: Manage youtube v3 livechat messages — allows a user to load live chat through a server-streamed rpc. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: liveChatId
parameters.description: The id of the live chat for which comments should be returned.

parameters.name: hl
parameters.description: Specifies the localization language in which the system messages should be returned.

parameters.name: profileImageSize
parameters.description: Specifies the size of the profile image that should be returned for each user.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: The *maxResults* parameter specifies the maximum number of items that should be returned in the result set. Not used in the streaming RPC.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: The *pageToken* parameter identifies a specific page in the result set that should be returned. In an API response, the nextPageToken property identify other pages that could be retrieved.

parameters.name: part
parameters.description: The *part* parameter specifies the liveChatComment resource parts that the API response will include. Supported values are id, snippet, and authorDetails.
